title: SALES MANAGER (F&B)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTIONS:

· Demonstrate ability to communicates, present and influence credibly and effectively at all levels of the organisation.

· Coordinating all sales activities in order a healthy and profitable relation with clients and associates

· Managing organisational sales by developing a business plan that cover sales, revenue and expenses control.

· Researching and identifying sales opportunities, generating leads and targeting potential clients through various communication

· Developing and improving relationships with key accounts to maintain a high level of service and client loyalty.

· Designing and implanting a strategic sales plan that expands company’s customer base and ensure its strong presence.

· Keeping good relationship with other sales related department in order to create a more thorough and effective campaign, events and strategy, for professional execution of all commitments.

· Strong in product knowledge, with ability to identify market trends while being fully aware of new products and competition status.

· Participate actively in all training, trade shows and sales meeting.

· Comply with company’s sop, procedures and policies.

· Delivering of sales pitches and presentations to client and highlighting the benefits of product and services

· Fully utilizing cater master system that is made compulsory to monitor client communication, maintain necessary data and records for future reference

· Plan to ensure achievement of divisional and personal target, aligning with company sales policies and strategies.

· Present sales report and communicate realistic forecast to superior.

· Understanding client needs and assisting in selecting appropriate product service that suits the desired specifications.

· The monthly sales target of 20 to 25 confirmed and closed sales during wedding shows, expos road shows including clubs and hotels.

· The 1% commission basis (commission will only be paid upon receiving payment of the events)

· The monthly sales achieved will be excluding GST and service charge.

· Overall, in-charge of level 3 restaurant outlet, assist during lunch and dinner peak hours.

REQUIREMENTS:

· At least diploma in relevant field

· Preferably 5 years of sales manager experience in a F&B, wholesale, consumer goods.

· Demonstrable knowledge in sales.

· Attention to detail and ability to work independently.

· Have a strong sense of responsibility and ability to manage internal and external confidential information with utmost discretion.

· Highly organised and meticulous and able to follow through on tasks from start to completion.

A fine dining restaurant for groups prioritizes an upscale and refined experience, focusing on culinary artistry, high-quality ingredients and 100% Halal & Muslim Owned
